response.justification: The candidate brings highly relevant Staff-level experience, including direct work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second. Although they lack the required Python expertise, their deep proficiency in TypeScript, distributed systems architecture, and AI-native developer tooling strongly aligns with the core demands of this role.
strengths: Direct hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven ability to design high-throughput distributed systems, previously handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated technical leadership and ownership through Staff-level roles and Founder experience.
concerns: Lacks any mentioned experience with Python, which is a must-have requirement for the role.
Extensive use of niche technologies (like DLang) for past high-performance systems instead of mainstream enterprise stacks.
No explicit mention of participating in on-call rotations or specific incident-response frameworks.
